chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-279 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of M.A No.2067/ 2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 27-11-2025. Applicant present in person. Mr. Neel Parkash, D.P.G. = Applicant Aamir Farooque has filed instant Criminal Miscellaneous application whereby he impugned order dated 09-02-2022 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Umerkot, on the ground that learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has passed remarks/observations against SHO Syed Atif Ali Shah. Learned DPG has supported the impugned order. On query from applicant that how he is aggrieved person from the impugned order; he submits that impugned order is against SHO Syed Atif Ali Shah, who is officer. However, he admits that SHO has not challenged impugned order before this court. The contentions raised by the applicant cannot be considered on the point that applicant is not aggrieved person, therefore, application is not maintainable. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application alongwith listed application is hereby dismissed. JUDGE *Saleem*
